panels.description: Total CDC event count accumulated over time.
panels.title: CDC Event Total Count

targets.expr: sum(rate(tici_writer_cdc_operation_latency_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type) / sum(rate(tici_writer_cdc_operation_latency_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type)

sum(rate(tici_writer_frag_operation_latency_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type) / sum(rate(tici_writer_frag_operation_latency_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type)

sum(rate(tici_worker_compaction_duration_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (stage) / sum(rate(tici_worker_compaction_duration_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (stage)

sum(rate(tici_worker_compaction_fragment_count_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (name) / sum(rate(tici_worker_compaction_fragment_count_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (name)

sum(rate(tici_worker_compaction_fragment_size_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (name) / sum(rate(tici_worker_compaction_fragment_size_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (name)

sum(rate(tici_shard_writer_manager_operation_duration_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type) / sum(rate(tici_shard_writer_manager_operation_duration_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type)

panels.description: Total rows processed by import into.
panels.title: Import Rows

panels.description: Total bytes processed by import into.
panels.title: Import Bytes

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(tici_grpc_handle_duration_bucket{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="worker"}[1m])) by (le, type))
sum by (type, result) (rate(tici_grpc_handle_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="worker"}[1m]))
sum by (service, type) (tici_grpc_handle_inflight{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="worker"})

sum(rate(tici_meta_client_grpc_handle_duration_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type) / sum(rate(tici_meta_client_grpc_handle_duration_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type)

sum(rate(tici_dedup_stage_latency_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (stage) / sum(rate(tici_dedup_stage_latency_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (stage)

panels.description: Backend storage request duration by backend and operation type

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(tici_storage_handle_duration_bucket{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="worker"}[1m])) by (le, backend, type))

sum(rate(tici_storage_handle_duration_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="worker"}[1m])) by (backend, type) / sum(rate(tici_storage_handle_duration_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="worker"}[1m])) by (backend, type)

panels.title: Storage Handle Duration

panels.description: Backend storage request rate by backend, operation type, and result

targets.expr: sum by (backend, type, result) (rate(tici_storage_handle_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="worker"}[1m]))

panels.title: Storage Handle Count

panels.description: Inflight backend storage requests by backend and operation type

targets.expr: sum by (backend, type) (tici_storage_handle_inflight{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="worker"})

panels.title: Storage Handle Inflight

list.label: Instance
list.name: instance
list.query: query_result(max by (instance) (up{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", component="tici-worker"} or up{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"tici-worker-.+"} or up{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", job="tici"}))
